understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 levels by moving/placing every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are simultaneously occupied, which triggers WIN for the level and ultimately completes the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each action moved the currently selected piece in 3-pixel grid steps (x right/left, y down/up) unless blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects; some adjacent objects could potentially be pushed if pushable, but walls generally prevented movement. Multiple selectable pieces existed, and control could be switched by using CLICK on the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable as listed in the state. Movement-blocked hints only indicated adjacency and did not guarantee success. A finite step budget per level meant inefficient moves could exhaust steps and end the run.
